prestazioni: Engine: FA20 (DIT) with forged internals including Manley 87mm forged pistons, Eagle H-beam connecting rods, and a Tomei 260° duration camshaft kit to handle 1.5 bar boost on a Garrett GTX3076R Gen II turbocharger with a 0.82 A/R turbine housing and billet compressor wheel for optimized spool and 450+ hp potential
Drivetrain: STI 6-speed close-ratio transmission with a PPG short-throw shifter, STI carbon driveshaft, and a Cusco 2-way limited-slip differential with 4.44 final gearing for aggressive acceleration

Suspension: Öhlins Road & Track DFV coilovers with 8kg/mm front springs and 9kg/mm rear springs, STI front strut tower bar, and Cusco 22mm adjustable rear sway bar for precise handling on Nürburgring-grade tarmac
estetica: Aero: STI S206-specific carbon fiber front lip, STI rear diffuser, and a Voltex Type-3 rear wing with adjustable angle for high-speed stability (replacing the OEM S206 wing for increased downforce)

Exterior: RAYS Gram Lights 57DR 18x9.5 +40 wheels with 245/40R18 Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 tires, STI carbon fiber side skirts, and a custom STI Heritage Blue paint job with matte black accents on the hood and roof
Interior: Recaro SR-7 SPG seats with Alcantara and red stitching, STI titanium shift knob, and a custom STI S206-spec carbon fiber dashboard overlay with matching door panel inserts
